text:
RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
WIFE COMING FROM OTHER
PLACE.
MOON+SATURN= NATIVE CHANGES PLACE OF
CAREER-AND MOTHER SUFFERS
FROM LITTLE GASTRIC HEALTH
PROBLEMS.
MOON+D-HEAD• MOTHER HAVING AN AMIABLE
MIND (CO-OPERATION WITH ALL).
GRAND FATHER COMING FROM
OTHER PLACE. NATIVE IS
GENERALLY A FOUL-MINDED
PERSON.
VENUS
FORTUNE OF THE WIFE FROM MALE (i.e., HUSBAND'S
CHART)-HERE VENUS IS THE WIFE.
SUN+V ENUS Venus indicates wealth and hence
wife is from a reputed family.
MOON+V ENUS Wife coming from other place.
MARS+V ENUS Wife coming from blood relations.
MERCURY+ VENUS Wife coming from intellectual
aspected house.
JUPITER +VENUS Wife hailing from spiritual heredity.
mACIN HEAD+-VENUS Wife from normal family and who
left Career.
DRAGON-TAIL+VENUS Wife from small village or distant
place.
VENUS+SUN Wife is proud and wealthy also.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 37
VENUS+MOON Wife possessing artistic inclination
and visits many places.
